records.provenance: app process and best-effort login shell merged wholesale before policy overlays
records.currentBehavior: inherited; this makes the current exposure set open-ended
records.targetRule: replace with an explicit per-execution-unit allowlist; an unclassified key fails plan creation

records.provenance: shell/app process with normalized home, identity, terminal and development-mode defaults
records.targetRule: resolve and snapshot non-secret values in ProcessExecutionUnit environment policy

records.provenance: custom Claude configuration selected before provider-aware child construction
records.targetRule: preserve only when the configured Claude base differs from the auto-detected default

records.provenance: host-emitted positive provider and backend selection pins
records.targetRule: emit both pins for every selected primary provider after removing inherited routing keys

records.provenance: inherited legacy provider-routing flags removed before every primary provider spawn
records.targetRule: remove before spawn and never re-emit; CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRY_PROVIDER is the positive provider pin

records.provenance: inherited Anthropic backend selection normalized to one positive Bedrock flag
records.targetRule: re-emit only for an Anthropic Bedrock backend; remove for all other Anthropic backends and providers

records.provenance: inherited Anthropic backend selection normalized to one positive Vertex flag
records.targetRule: re-emit only for an Anthropic Vertex backend; remove for all other Anthropic backends and providers

records.provenance: inherited Anthropic backend selection normalized to one positive Foundry flag
records.targetRule: re-emit only for an Anthropic Foundry backend; remove for all other Anthropic backends and providers

records.provenance: configured backend identifiers emitted before provider-specific overrides
records.targetRule: emit the configured Codex and Gemini backend identifiers, then override the selected provider when explicitly requested

records.provenance: app-owned deterministic provisioning setup
records.targetRule: runtime settings path must be owned/read-only; control URL is location only and conveys no authority

records.provenance: explicit environment, approved stored connection, Claude credential storage, or compatible endpoint settings
records.targetRule: minimum one selected auth mode; competing values cleared; represent exposure by SecretRef class, never value

records.provenance: app-owned per-team/run helper material
records.targetRule: path metadata only; helper/key files remain 0700/0600 and must not cross execution units

records.provenance: Codex account snapshot, approved stored key, explicit env, app-managed binary, and connection configuration
records.targetRule: key or account artifacts only when selected; binary/home metadata may be required by resolved backend

records.provenance: approved stored key/explicit env or Google ADC plus project metadata
records.targetRule: API key or compatible ADC/project pair according to immutable backend selection

records.provenance: app-derived OpenCode child metadata and managed configuration
records.targetRule: derive in the host and emit only to the managed OpenCode execution unit

records.provenance: optional managed OpenCode data-home marker selected by the runtime host
records.targetRule: admit only as a selected OpenCode child input; do not treat presence as host authority

records.provenance: host policy derives an optional OpenCode-native child key
records.targetRule: emit OPENCODE_DISABLE_AUTOUPDATE unless explicit host policy permits updates; never emit the allow-policy key

records.provenance: desktop host policy and binary-selection inputs consumed before child environment construction
records.targetRule: consume on the host only; do not expose these policy/override keys to the managed OpenCode child

records.provenance: host-selected binary paths copied to the managed OpenCode bridge for compatibility
records.targetRule: validate on the host, then emit only the selected paths to the OpenCode bridge child

records.provenance: app-resolved MCP launch spec or app-owned local HTTP MCP server
records.targetRule: allowlisted launch metadata only; MCP env JSON must not contain provider or runtime-ingress credentials

records.provenance: app-owned member-work-sync spool and installation identity store
records.targetRule: registered roots only; identity is correlation metadata, never authorization

records.provenance: app-derived and write-probed runner cache paths on Windows
records.targetRule: absent on Linux; if Windows is later supported, paths must be execution-unit owned

records.provenance: desktop app process kill switches read before deterministic bootstrap
records.currentBehavior: read from the app environment but not intentionally forwarded as child policy
records.targetRule: host configuration may gate readiness; these desktop compatibility flags are absent from provider children

records.provenance: ambient Electron host environment
records.targetRule: must remain absent

keys: runtime-ingress bearer in any environment key
records.provenance: target lane relay one-use inherited pipe only
records.targetRule: provider/agent environment, argv, settings, MCP config and run files never receive the bearer

records.provenance: generic ambient environment preservation characterized by the provider runtime environment fixture
records.targetRule: admit only for the selected Bedrock backend and resolve through the execution-unit policy

records.provenance: host platform, proxy, CA and interactive-shell environment reads in production main-process runtime paths
records.targetRule: admit only values explicitly required by the resolved backend; paths and proxy/CA inputs are snapshotted and policy-reviewed

records.provenance: desktop/controller configuration, diagnostics, feature gates and injection-sensitive runtime controls read by production main-process code
records.currentBehavior: ambient inheritance can currently expose these values to descendants
records.targetRule: host-only inputs and loader/runtime injection controls are absent from every provider execution unit

records.provenance: workspace-trust Claude PTY preflight sanitizer removes the inherited helper-mode control before provider-child execution
records.currentBehavior: explicitly removed from the workspace-trust preflight child environment
records.targetRule: the helper-mode host control remains absent from every workspace-trust Claude provider child

records.provenance: workspace-trust Claude PTY preflight sanitizer removes every inherited key in the runtime-settled, MCP, and team-bootstrap namespaces
records.currentBehavior: all matching keys are explicitly removed from the workspace-trust preflight child environment
records.targetRule: the three host-control namespaces remain absent from every workspace-trust Claude provider child

rows: runtime-ingress bearer in any environment key

perKeyModel.targetVerification: target-unverified: final-image child visibility, disjoint credential sets, and runtime relay injection remain unproved
perKeyModel.resolution: Each non-routing key resolves through an independent source-authority fixture. Provider-routing keys resolve through executable production environment branches across seven provider/backend scenarios, including emission, conditional preservation, and removal behavior.
